articles.description: India's dominant T20 World Cup title win - their third white-ball trophy in a row - shows the other nations need to catch up, writes Matthew Henry.
articles.title: T20 World Cup: India's third white-ball trophy win in a row proves rest of world need to catch up

articles.description: A sensational fourth weekend of the Six Nations sees Scotland give themselves a chance of the title, while Italy beat England for the first time.
articles.title: Six Nations talking points: Round four delivers thrills and shocks

articles.description: World number one Aryna Sabalenka hits 23 winners as she beats Jaqueline Cristian to move into the fourth round at Indian Wells.
articles.title: Aryna Sabalenka 'super-focused' to reach Indian Wells fourth round

articles.description: Para-alpine skier Varvara Voronchikhina wins the first Paralympic gold medal for Russia since 2014 with victory in the standing super G.
articles.title: Winter Paralympics 2026: Varvara Voronchikhina wins Russia's first gold since 2014

articles.description: As if the ugliness of the 120 minutes wasn't enough there was disgrace as Rangers and Celtic fans invaded the pitch at Ibrox, writes Tom English.
articles.title: Rangers v Celtic: 'Disgraceful scenes as toxicity spills over in Old Firm cup tie'

articles.description: Iraq head coach Graham Arnold wants Iraq's World Cup play-off decider to be rescheduled to the week before the tournament to give his side a fair chance of qualifying.
articles.title: World Cup: Iraq coach wants play-off to be postponed amid US-Israeli war with Iran

articles.description: "It's regrettable," says former Brazil forward Hulk after becoming one of 23 players are sent off following a mass brawl between Cruzeiro and Atletico Mineiro.
articles.title: 23 players see red card after mass brawl in Brazilian cup final between Cruzeiro and Atletico Mineiro

articles.description: As Scotland's players stood with hands on heads after what appeared to be a ruinous opening Six Nations defeat by Italy in Rome, a Wooden Spoon appeared a distinct possibility. A title challenge? No chance.
articles.title: Six Nations 2026: How Scotland went from brink of disaster to edge of glory

articles.description: Concern has grown for team after one critic called them 'wartime traitors' for failing to salute during the Iranian anthem.
articles.title: Iran football team: Australia urged to protect Lionesses after elimination at Asian Cup

articles.description: Britain's Sky Brown becomes a skateboarding world champion for the second time after winning gold in a rain-disrupted park event in Brazil.
articles.title: Skateboarding World Championships: Britain's Sky Brown wins park gold
